title: Verify existing implementation of deep merge utility
description: The deepMerge function and 18 comprehensive tests already exist in src/utils/object-helpers.ts and src/utils/object-helpers.test.ts. All tests pass (18/18). Implementation includes: recursive merge without mutation, deep nested object merging, array replacement, null/primitive handling, and type preservation.
existing_patterns: src/utils/flatten.ts — single-function utility modules with co-located .test.ts files
